title: Harris Seriously Good Gloss Flat Paint Brush 1.5in
features: You will get our finest finish when painting with Gloss, Eggshell or Satin paints. We have designed this paint brush with a specialised blend of filaments to give you our best finish when painting with oil based paints, such as Gloss, Eggshell and Satin
The patented No-Loss* technology guarantees no bristle loss while you are painting.

This 1.5 inch brush is excellent for painting wooden trim such as skirting boards, door architraves, stair banisters, window sills and window frames with oil based paints like Gloss, Eggshell and Satin.
For best results rub the brush with a clean hand before use to remove any dust particles. Do not wet.

Our Ultimate paint brushes have been made to last. After painting with gloss, satin or eggshell paints use a specialised cleaner such as white spirit to clean the brush. Refer to the paint tin for further guidance. *Bristle loss may occur if left to soak or in a damp area.
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Seriously Good Woodwork Gloss Paint Brush 1.5in Contains 1 x Harris Seriously Good Woodwork Gloss Paint Brush 1.5in After care After painting with oil based paints such as gloss, satin and eggshell. These paints require specialised cleaners, please refer to the paint tin for further guidance. *Bristle loss may occur if left to soak or if left in a damp area. For use when painting flat sections of wooden trim This paintbrush has been specifically designed and engineered to give you seriously good results when painting woodwork with all gloss, eggshell and satin paints. No Bristle Loss*. For use with all gloss, eggshell and satin paints. Suggested use For use when painting flat sections of wooden trim, such as skirting boards, stair banisters, doors and door architraves with gloss, eggshell and satin paints. For best results rub the brush with a clean hand before use to remove any dust particles. Do not wet. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier
